steps.title: Set up the percentage calculation
steps.content: Stefan used 80% of his total fencing. To find how many feet he used, we need to calculate 80% of 500 feet.

steps.title: Calculate 80% of 500
steps.content:
Convert the percentage to a decimal and multiply:
$$0.80 \times 500 = 400$$
Stefan used 400 feet of fencing to surround the vegetable garden. That matches choice C — C is correct.
